body.title: Anticipation primitive — dopamine-like predicted-valence-delta signal
body.result: Slice 1 substrate shipped (commit 6819d2a5). New file wild_igor/igor/cognition/anticipator.py provides Anticipation dataclass + Anticipator (rolling-mean predictor with RPE register_outcome) + AnticipationBus (active-set with confidence-weighted top_k and settle) + module singletons. 17 unit + integration tests. Suite 4308 → 4325. Plug-points (HIGH-inertia: pursuits.py, basal_ganglia.py) deferred to follow-on tickets T-anticipation-slice2-pursuit-emit (S, gated on Akien pre-approval) and T-anticipation-slice3-action-selection-read (M, gated on Akien pre-approval). Existing cognition/anticipation.py (closure-valence-for-ticket-selection) untouched — possible future consolidation through this primitive.
body.description:
The 'want' Igor is missing (see memory/project_missing_want_primitive.md). Forward-looking pull-signal distinct from backward-looking bliss/valence. Two-part: (1) referent — model of the predicted state/outcome; (2) anticipation signal — predicted-valence-delta toward that referent. Dopaminergic analogue: RPE-trained predictor whose output biases action selection BEFORE outcome is observed.

Proposed shape (sketch, not binding):
- `Anticipation` dataclass: referent_id, referent_type, predicted_delta, confidence, created_at.
- `Anticipator`: .predict(referent) -> Anticipation; .register_outcome(ant, actual_delta) -> rpe; updates predictor weights.
- `AnticipationBus`: module-level active-set; top_k() reads biased by predicted_delta; settle() closes out.

Plug points:
- Pursuit adoption -> Anticipator.predict -> Bus.push (emit 'I want this')
- Action/workflow selection (basal_ganglia, reasoner depth, TWM consumers) reads top_k and biases toward high predicted_delta instead of deterministic rules
- Outcome observation -> register_outcome -> RPE -> updates predictor AND milieu (positive surprise lifts valence; negative deflates — the *teaching* signal)

T-twm-goal-ready-listener (shipping today) is the pre-RPE scaffold: deterministic wire with confidence=1.0, no learning. Real anticipator swaps that wire for a prediction call — today's work makes the later swap a one-file change.

**Affected files:** TBD — new modules in cognition/, plug-points into pursuits, basal_ganglia, milieu, possibly reasoner base.
**Design rules:** oop-first; docs-in-code; no-new-memory-schemas (anticipations are a working-memory structure, TWM-shaped or in-process cache — NOT a new memories_* table); test-plan-or-why-not.
**Scope boundary:** IN — Anticipation dataclass, Anticipator with simple initial prediction rule (experiential-memory lookup), AnticipationBus, one concrete plug-point (Pursuit adoption -> emit, workflow selection -> read) to prove the loop. OUT — RL training of the predictor (separate future ticket), full multi-module rewrite, milieu rebuild.
**Test plan:** unit tests per class; integration test where Pursuit adoption emits an anticipation and action selection surfaces it; settle() test showing RPE computation and predictor weight update.
**Inertia check:** plug-points into basal_ganglia (MEDIUM+) and pursuits (MEDIUM). Pre-approval required before editing those.
**Related:** gates on T-twm-goal-ready-listener. Design-linked to memory/project_missing_want_primitive.md.

## P1 status (Akien 2026-05-01)

This is P1 for the next sprint batch. Before sprint, **consider Opus-level consult** on the Anticipator design (RPE training shape, predicted-valence-delta computation, integration with TWM/milieu). Sized at XL — split-or-decide-Opus-consult is a pre-sprint decision.
